'''Denlace Sachoore''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Corporate Alliance/Legends|Corporate Alliance]] clerk in the [[Fakir sector/Legends|Fakir sector]].

At the age of 24 [[Standard year/Legends|years]] old, she was arrested by the Alliance when she was found hiding data in a cranium-implanted [[vessel drive]]. Her arrest led to the destruction of a clandestine [[Yirt-4138-Grek-12 slicer compound|compound]] on the [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] [[Yirt-4138-Grek-12]] in [[23 BBY/Legends|23 BBY]].
